name: Ricoh GR III OTH Digital Camera
description: The Ricoh GR III continues the legacy of being a pocketable powerhouse, offering impressive image quality, fast response, and immense portability. Featuring a redeveloped imaging feature set, the GR III combines a 24.2MP APS-C CMOS sensor and GR 6 Engine to realize smooth tonality, rich colors and high sensitivity from ISO 100-102400, along with the ability to output high-resolution 14-games small DNG or Full HD video.

features.Key Features :: 24MP APS-C sensor | 18.3mm (28mm equivalent) F2.8 lens | 3-axis in-body SR stabilization system | On-sensor phase detection autofocus | Ultrasonic sensor cleaning | 3" 1.04M-dot touch-sensitive LCD screen | Anti-aliasing filter simulation | Optional 21mm equivalent GW-4 wide adapter lens | 1080/60p video | USB 3.0 (Type C) enables in-camera charging
features.In The Box:: DB-110 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (3.6V, 1350mAh) | I-USB166 USB Cable | Power Adapter | AC Plug | Hand Strap | GN-1 Ring Cap (Black) | Hot Shoe Cover
